mapper.select:
select id, name, code, description, environments, owner_id, schema_consistent, schema_reference_env from project
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and code like concat('%', #{code}, '%')
and (owner_id = #{ownerId} or id in (select project_id from project_member where user_id = #{ownerId}))
order by id desc
select id, name, code, description, environments, owner_id, schema_consistent, schema_reference_env from project where id = #{id}
select owner_id from project where id = #{id}
select count(1) from project where code = #{code} and owner_id = #{ownerId} and id <> #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into project(name, code, owner_id, description, environments, schema_reference_env, created_at, updated_at) values (#{name}, #{code}, #{ownerId}, #{description}, #{environments}, #{schemaReferenceEnv}, now(), now())
